message:
fix(scope_watchdog): use live_count_by_tier to ignore closed scopes in leak detection

The scope leak detection was counting all scopes (including closed ones)
against tier limits via count_by_tier, producing false ScopeLeak alerts
when many scopes had been properly closed. Switch to live_count_by_tier
which only counts active scopes.

Add test detect_scope_leak_ignores_closed_scopes that registers 25 daemon
scopes, closes 10 of them, and verifies no ScopeLeak alert fires — proving
that the watchdog correctly excludes finalized scopes from its threshold
calculations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
